subcodes.first_line: O thou assured soul! His Holiness the Absolute One hath loosed His tongue in praise and prayer, saying: "Praise be to God, that existence..." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نفس مطمئنه جناب مطلق لسان ستایش گشوده و نیایش فرموده که الحمد لله آن وجود
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @He Whom God Shall Make Manifest; the Bab and Baha'u'llah, @praise and encouragement, @future of Haifa; of the Holy Land
